---
title: "Human Development and Sustainable Development"
subtitle: "Indicators of development, global sustainability goals, and geographies of health."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include human-development/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Human Development and Sustainable Development** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include human-development/01-development-indicators.md >}}

{{< include human-development/02-sustainable-development-goals.md >}}

{{< include human-development/03-health-geography-epidemiology.md >}}

---
